photographer.name: Valeriy Grachev
bio: Fashion and editorial photographer working across Bangkok, Moscow, and Hong Kong. The work moves between styled editorial — traditional dress, winter fashion on film, golden-hour portraiture — and documentary, from backstage at fashion week to the architecture of everyday life.

Interested in ceremony, texture, and the in-between: the seconds before a runway show, the weight of silk against weathered stone, the way expired film stock turns a snowstorm blue. Available for commissions worldwide.

shoots.title: Tết in Hanoi
shoots.subtitle: Collection I
shoots.description: Ancient temple gardens, silk áo dài, and the quiet ceremony of the Lunar New Year — photographed in the final days of winter.
shoots.heroAlt: Silhouette of a man in white áo dài standing in a temple doorway, Hanoi
about: Photographed in the days surrounding Tết Nguyên Đán — the Vietnamese Lunar New Year — this series moves through the ancient temple gardens of Hanoi. Two figures in traditional áo dài trace quiet paths between moss-covered stone, cherry blossoms, and the circular moon gates that frame passage between worlds.

The work is concerned with stillness and ceremony: the weight of silk against weathered stone, the formality of a fan held just so, the way winter light falls through doorways that have stood for centuries.
shoots.details: Hanoi, Vietnam · February 2026 | Traditional áo dài styling · Natural & available light | Nikon Z · 12 selects from 400+ frames

shoots.title: Cold
shoots.subtitle: Collection II
shoots.description: Expired film, a snowstorm outside Moscow, and three figures in houndstooth moving through a landscape stripped to white.
shoots.heroAlt: Three models in winter coats, intimate black and white close-up against snow
about: Shot on medium-format and 35mm film during a snowstorm outside Moscow. Three figures wrapped in houndstooth and plaid move through a landscape stripped of color — just white ground, bare trees, and the cold blue cast of expired film stock.
Close-up portraits pressed together for warmth. Then a solitary figure, swallowed by the frozen expanse. The film grain and light leaks are part of the texture — as essential as the wool and snow.
shoots.details: Russia · Winter 2024 | Fashion editorial · Film photography | Medium format & Kodak HP5+ · 8 selects

shoots.title: Silk River
shoots.subtitle: Collection III
shoots.description: One floral robe, one summer evening, one river. The point was never the clothing.
shoots.heroAlt: Diptych of woman against ancient tree in golden light, color and black & white
about: Photographed on a single summer evening along a river outside the city. The model wears a single floral-print robe across every frame — the point was never the clothing but the way it moved against dried cow-parsley stems, dark water, and the last amber light before nightfall.

The diptych format recurs throughout: color beside black and white, close-up beside landscape, the figure grounded in nature and then dissolved into it. The series ends at the water's edge, where silk and current become the same thing.
shoots.details: Russia · Summer 2024 | Editorial · Natural light | Diptych compositions · 8 selects

shoots.title: Backstage Moscow
shoots.subtitle: Collection IV
shoots.description: Backstage at Mercedes-Benz Fashion Week Moscow. Concrete walls, blue carpet, the seconds before the runway.
shoots.heroAlt: Young model in velvet corset top against grey concrete wall backstage at MBFW Moscow
about: Backstage access during Mercedes-Benz Fashion Week in Moscow. Flash and available light, color mixed with black and white. The blue carpet and industrial concrete become a recurring stage. The interest is not the runway but the seconds before it — a model waiting alone against a wall, stylists making last-minute adjustments, the controlled chaos that the audience never sees.
shoots.details: Mercedes-Benz Fashion Week, Moscow · 2023 | Backstage documentary | Flash & available light · 8 selects

shoots.title: Hong Kong
shoots.subtitle: Collection V
shoots.description: Portra 400 and an iPhone. Markets, bamboo scaffolding, island sunsets — the city between typhoons.
shoots.heroAlt: Two figures with umbrellas crossing a painted blue and orange ground, aerial view, Hong Kong
about: Shot over two visits in 2025, mixing Kodak Portra 400 with phone photographs. The film frames carry the sprocket marks and colour shifts of uncut rolls — a contact sheet closes the series. The phone images fill in the gaps: bamboo scaffolding from street level, a backstreet full of parked bicycles.
Hong Kong photographs itself. The painted ground, the red taxi, the harbour before a storm — the city offers these without asking. The camera just has to be there.
shoots.details: Hong Kong · 2025 | Street & documentary | Kodak Portra 400 & iPhone · 7 selects

layout.alt: Two figures with umbrellas crossing a painted blue and orange ground, aerial view, Hong Kong

shoots.title: Celestial Valley
shoots.subtitle: Collection VI
shoots.description: A white horse, a Russian field in clover, two figures in Victorian riding coats. Poe's 'Annabel Lee' as a fashion editorial.
shoots.heroAlt: Diptych: close-up of woman's face beside horse's eye, black and white, Russian field
about: Two models in Victorian-cut riding coats and silver jewelry, a white horse, and a clover field outside Moscow. The series pairs color against black and white, close-up portraiture against open landscape — the same diptych logic that runs through the later work, here at its earliest.

Shot in the hour before sunset when overcast Russian light goes flat and soft. The images that work best are the simplest: a face pressed to a horse's cheek, a cross pendant against black wool, two riders dissolving into a field at the edge of the frame.
shoots.details: Russia · 2016 | Fashion editorial · Natural light | Diptych compositions · 7 selects

shoots.title: Personal
shoots.subtitle: Miscellaneous
shoots.description: Flash portraits, film landscapes, and the in-between moments — a collection of personal work across Moscow, Southeast Asia, and elsewhere.
about: A loose collection of personal work — night flash at train stations, rooftop energy, intimate diptychs, film landscapes, and street light. No brief, no client, just the camera and whatever felt right.
shoots.details: Various locations · 2019–2025 | Flash, natural light, film | Nikon, iPhone
